svg.title: Bedroom two memory fragment (apartment three) - emotionally familiar but partially forgotten
svg.desc: A small writing desk lit by a dim shaded lamp in the muted blue-violet light of evening. Stacked books and an open notebook sit on the desk; a small mug with a few pens leans behind them. On the wall above the desk: a cork board where some notes and photographs are still pinned and others are gone, with only the pin and a torn corner remaining. To the right of the cork board, a few rectangles of slightly lighter paint where pictures used to hang. To the left, a small window cropped at the edge of the frame shows a quiet evening sky. The corner of a bed is cropped at the left edge: a pillow and a folded blanket, the rest hidden. The whole scene is washed slightly cool, like a memory that is calm but starting to lose its outlines.
